note: Sample patterns demonstrating schema structure. Full database contains 540 patterns.

patterns.title: Memory exhaustion during large playbook execution
symptoms: OOM killer terminates process during playbook run
Playbook with 500+ tasks fails mid-execution
causality_chain: Large playbook loaded into memory
Task results accumulate without cleanup
Memory exceeds container/host limit
OOM killer terminates process
patterns.root_cause: Playbook engine retains all intermediate task results in memory. For playbooks with >500 tasks, cumulative memory exceeds allocated limits.

steps: Enable incremental result cleanup in engine settings
resolution.workaround: Break playbook into smaller chunks with manual chaining

patterns.title: SSL certificate validation failure on proxy environments
symptoms: Integration test fails with SSL error
Certificate verify failed for external API calls
match_patterns: unable to get local issuer certificate
causality_chain: Corporate proxy performs TLS inspection
Proxy CA certificate not in trust store
Integration HTTP client rejects proxy certificate
patterns.root_cause: Corporate proxy CA certificate not added to the application trust store. TLS inspection breaks certificate chain validation.

steps: Obtain proxy CA certificate from IT team
resolution.workaround: Set SSL_CERT_FILE to point to proxy CA bundle

patterns.title: Log ingestion pipeline backpressure causing data loss
symptoms: Missing logs in search results
Ingestion rate drops to zero periodically
Broker VM shows queue full warnings
causality_chain: Log source burst exceeds pipeline capacity
Internal queues fill to capacity
Backpressure signal propagates to collectors
New events dropped until queue drains
patterns.root_cause: Default queue sizes insufficient for burst traffic patterns. Pipeline lacks dynamic scaling for temporary overload.

steps: Increase queue depth in collector configuration
resolution.workaround: Reduce log verbosity at source during peak hours

patterns.title: Agent upgrade fails silently on low disk space
symptoms: Agent version unchanged after upgrade push
No error in management console
Agent reports as connected but old version
causality_chain: Upgrade package downloaded to temp directory
Extraction fails due to insufficient disk space
Rollback restores previous version silently
Management console not notified of failure
patterns.root_cause: Agent upgrade process requires 2x package size in free disk space for extraction + rollback copy. Failure is not propagated to management console.

steps: Verify upgrade via agent CLI: agent_status --version
resolution.workaround: Clean temp directories before upgrade push

patterns.title: SAML SSO authentication loop
symptoms: User redirected repeatedly between IdP and application
Login page reloads after successful IdP authentication
Browser shows too many redirects error
causality_chain: IdP issues SAML assertion with timestamp
Clock skew between IdP and SP exceeds tolerance
SP rejects assertion as expired
SP redirects back to IdP for new assertion
Loop continues until browser limit
patterns.root_cause: Clock synchronization difference between Identity Provider and Service Provider exceeds the SAML assertion validity window (typically 5 minutes).

steps: Sync NTP on both IdP and SP servers
Increase SAML clock skew tolerance to 300 seconds
Verify with: date on both systems, check difference

patterns.title: HAR file analysis timeout on files >100MB
symptoms: HAR analysis returns timeout error
Large HAR file from long browser session
causality_chain: User captures HAR over extended period
HAR file exceeds 100MB
JSON parser loads entire file into memory
Analysis exceeds default timeout
patterns.root_cause: HAR forensics module loads entire file into memory for JSON parsing. Files over 100MB exceed the default analysis timeout.

steps: Trim HAR file to relevant time window
Use streaming HAR parser for large files
resolution.workaround: Split HAR recording into shorter sessions

patterns.title: Integration rate limiting causing intermittent failures
symptoms: Integration commands fail intermittently
HTTP 429 errors in server logs
Success rate drops during peak hours
causality_chain: Multiple playbooks invoke same integration concurrently
API rate limit on external service exceeded
HTTP 429 returned to integration command
Command fails, playbook error handling triggers
patterns.root_cause: No request rate limiting or queuing between playbook engine and external API integrations. Concurrent playbook executions can exceed API provider rate limits.

steps: Configure integration instance with rate limit settings
Enable request queuing in engine configuration
Implement exponential backoff in custom integrations

patterns.title: Content pack installation fails with dependency conflict
symptoms: Content pack install fails with dependency error
Marketplace shows pack as available but install fails
Error message references version mismatch
causality_chain: Pack A requires Pack B >= 2.0
Installed Pack B is 1.x
Marketplace dependency resolver fails
Installation aborted with conflict error
patterns.root_cause: Content pack dependency resolution does not automatically upgrade transitive dependencies. Conflicts must be resolved manually.

steps: Use force-install only as last resort
resolution.workaround: Manually update dependency packs before installing

patterns.title: Correlation rule false positives after dataset migration
symptoms: Alert volume spikes after data migration
Correlation rules trigger on historical data
False positive rate increases significantly
causality_chain: Historical data migrated into new dataset
Correlation engine processes migrated data as new events
Time-based rules trigger on old timestamps
Alert volume spikes with false positives
patterns.root_cause: Correlation engine does not distinguish between newly ingested events and migrated historical data. Time-windowed rules process all data regardless of original timestamp.

steps: Temporarily disable affected correlation rules during migration
Set data start time filter on correlation rules
resolution.workaround: Suppress alerts from migrated data source during migration window

patterns.title: Docker container restart loop on config validation failure
symptoms: Container restarts every 30 seconds
Config validation error in container logs
Service unavailable despite container running
causality_chain: Configuration change introduces invalid value
Application startup validates configuration
Validation fails, process exits with error
Container orchestrator restarts container
Loop continues with same invalid config
patterns.root_cause: Application validates configuration at startup but does not provide a recovery mechanism. Invalid configuration causes perpetual restart loop.

steps: Fix configuration file with correct values
resolution.workaround: Mount corrected config and restart manually
